AR1.justification: Routed the domain pattern to observations.md and explicitly stated why it does not belong in decisions.md, matching the methodology's strict bar that decisions.md is for constraining commitments.

AR2.justification: Each step produced a concrete artifact the next step read: AGENTS.md and observations.md were read to recover the template, methodology.md was read to resolve the provenance marker, then the entry was appended to observations.md.

AR3.justification: Cross-references use relative paths with stable anchors (methodology.md#provenance-markers) and an ISO-dated heading on the new entry, all resolving cleanly.

AR4.justification: The action is an append to an append-only register under a unique ISO-dated heading, so a re-run would add a new dated entry without mutating or corrupting prior history.
